nasb.text: For the brokenness of the daughter of my people I am broken; I mourn, dismay has taken hold of me.

esv.text: For the wound of the daughter of my people is my heart wounded; I mourn, and dismay has taken hold on me.

cnv.text: 因著我的同胞被壓碎，我的心破碎了； 我悲傷痛哭，驚慌抓住了我。

ccb.text: 同胞的创伤令我伤心欲绝， 痛苦万分， 惊慌失措。
